name: Komodo Dragon
conservationEfforts: Komodo National Park protects the majority of the population. Strict visitor management limits tourism impact. Ranger patrols prevent poaching of deer (the dragon's main prey).
description: The world's largest living lizard, reaching 3 meters and 70 kg. They have venomous bites and can detect carrion from 9.5 km away. Found only on a few Indonesian islands.
